# Logo selection archive

Historical artifacts from the logo-selection process (lookit-t8a). The final
mark lives at `../assets/logo.svg` / `logo.png`; brand guidance is in
`../BRAND.md`.

- `REVIEW-PROMPT.md` — the review brief used to evaluate candidates.
- `assets/gallery.html`, `assets/preview.html` — selection UIs (open locally).
- `assets/variants.js`, `assets/ascii.js` — data + ASCII companions driving the UIs.
- `assets/mockups/` — the 16 rejected candidate marks.

Kept for provenance; not referenced by the build or the app.
